rationale: Section 13.283 governs incentive aid reductions based on average daily attendance changes for reorganized districts. It does not reference homestead exemptions or appraised value, so no direct conflict arises.
quote: The incentive aid payments shall be reduced in direct proportion to any reduction in the average daily attendance as determined under Section 48.005 of the reorganized school district for the preceding year.
_note: No direct or indirect textual conflict between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this ADA-based incentive aid reduction provision.
